# the .tif is generated with the following code run in the https://code.earthengine.google.com/ 
# using the geojson inputs used in the project:
# each run can take about 10mins
# results are exported to Google Drive

#####################
RGB TASK GLOBAL VIEW WITH REGION HIGHLIGHTS
######################

    {"type":"Feature","geometry":{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[55.255515328486,25.00704685665382],[55.258819809992346,25.00346871480734],[55.261265984613935,25.0035853949897],[55.27577137096647,25.017702878985514],[55.27937625988248,25.022563895871116],[55.274483910639326,25.025674845655],[55.266587487299475,25.02952453683984],[55.26418422802214,25.02594705000939],[55.265385857660796,25.0211639427436],[55.26530002697233,25.01968619712106],[55.26332592113737,25.017313989319426],[55.26332592113737,25.014086157550246],[55.26302551372769,25.013036121695624],[55.255515328486,25.00704685665382]]]},"id":"24","properties":{"name":"mudon"}}
  ]
});




Map.centerObject(fc, 10);
Map.setOptions('SATELLITE');

var region = fc.geometry().buffer(1500).bounds();

var s2L1C = ee.ImageCollection('COPERNICUS/S2_HARMONIZED')   // Level-1C
  .filterBounds(region)
  .filterDate('2024-01-01', '2024-12-31')
  // use RGB bands directly; L1C is scaled 0–10000
  .select(['B4','B3','B2'])
  .median()
  .clip(region);

var s2Vis = s2L1C.visualize({
  min: 300,   // slightly above dark
  max: 3500,  // typical bright cap for deserts/urban
  gamma: 1.2
});

var fillPaint    = ee.Image().byte().paint(fc, 1).selfMask();       // fill
var outlinePaint = ee.Image().byte().paint(fc, 1, 2).selfMask();    // outline width=2

var fillImg = fillPaint.visualize({ palette: ['ff6b6b'], opacity: 0.30 });
var outlineImg = outlinePaint.visualize({ palette: ['ffffff'] });

/***** Composite for preview/export *****/
var styled = s2Vis.blend(fillImg).blend(outlineImg);

// Preview
Map.addLayer(s2Vis, {}, 'S2 L1C background (median 2024)');
Map.addLayer(fillImg, {}, 'Regions fill');
Map.addLayer(outlineImg, {}, 'Regions outline');

Export.image.toDrive({
  image: styled,                     // RGB
  description: 'dubai_regions_map_geotiff_scale30',
  folder: 'earthengine',
  fileNamePrefix: 'dubai_regions_map_scale30',
  fileFormat: 'GeoTIFF',
  region: region,
  scale: 30,                         // lighter than 10 m, still great for figures
  crs: 'EPSG:3857',
  maxPixels: 1e13
});




##########################
FOLLOWING IS THE SAR VERSION OF GLOBAL tif
##########################



var fc = ee.FeatureCollection({
  "type":"FeatureCollection","features":[
    {"type":"Feature","geometry":{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[55.21003905177415,25.076774258770524],[55.19664946437181,25.060991951646685],[55.19501868129075,25.05275013595706],[55.19785109401049,25.045129851049683],[55.19965353846849,25.043496871235302],[55.209524067643294,25.045129851049687],[55.220424565079824,25.050184174546025],[55.22282782435716,25.05523828966504],[55.21982375026048,25.065890126643815],[55.21458807826341,25.07358686309247],[55.21003905177415,25.076774258770524]]]},"id":"0","properties":{"name":"jumeirah_village_circle"}},

    {"type":"Feature","geometry":{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[55.268107497277796,25.194440362929946],[55.26909455019528,25.19059586126263],[55.27776344973141,25.185197820807172],[55.2799950476318,25.187683279216653],[55.282655798974574,25.19113953553173],[55.286260687890596,25.193236542124282],[55.28892143923336,25.195100517674863],[55.27076824862057,25.204847091827386],[55.26445969301754,25.19645964852905],[55.268107497277796,25.194440362929946]]]},"id":"3","properties":{"name":"downtown_dubai"}},

    {"type":"Feature","geometry":{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[55.233178954345355,25.03430902053258],[55.25197587512173,25.045040436619523],[55.2494867851559,25.053827056274812],[55.24648271105922,25.054915620172782],[55.228458266479144,25.052738482709074],[55.22554002307095,25.04760650568959],[55.233178954345355,25.03430902053258]]]},"id":"20","properties":{"name":"motor_city"}},
    {"type":"Feature","geometry":{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[55.12589059374965,25.07415827826698],[55.12898049853481,25.07217584104172],[55.13039670489467,25.072253584282574],[55.14134011767543,25.082787336972437],[55.136791091186176,25.086013360371098],[55.13245664141811,25.079328012599532],[55.12726388476528,25.07423602024932],[55.12589059374965,25.07415827826698]]]},"id":"21","properties":{"name":"jumeriah_beach_residence"}},
    {"type":"Feature","geometry":{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[55.21693022968265,25.011047707454356],[55.21993430377935,25.00459162964734],[55.225513298530316,24.99961321747365],[55.2317789387891,24.995334733349317],[55.25134833576176,25.010192102191773],[55.23907454730961,25.023569975023726],[55.21693022968265,25.011047707454356]]]},"id":"22","properties":{"name":"damac_lagoons"}},
    {"type":"Feature","geometry":{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[55.16463892593061,25.094551280804684],[55.17347948684369,25.08654492614263],[55.17626898421918,25.090975692001297],[55.16901629104291,25.098087901713694],[55.16463892593061,25.094551280804684]]]},"id":"23","properties":{"name":"the_greens"}},
    {"type":"Feature","geometry":{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[55.255515328486,25.00704685665382],[55.258819809992346,25.00346871480734],[55.261265984613935,25.0035853949897],[55.27577137096647,25.017702878985514],[55.27937625988248,25.022563895871116],[55.274483910639326,25.025674845655],[55.266587487299475,25.02952453683984],[55.26418422802214,25.02594705000939],[55.265385857660796,25.0211639427436],[55.26530002697233,25.01968619712106],[55.26332592113737,25.017313989319426],[55.26332592113737,25.014086157550246],[55.26302551372769,25.013036121695624],[55.255515328486,25.00704685665382]]]},"id":"24","properties":{"name":"mudon"}}
  ]
});


var region = fc.geometry().buffer(1500).bounds()

var start = ee.Date('2024-05-01')
var end   = start.advance(7, 'day')

var s1 = ee.ImageCollection('COPERNICUS/S1_GRD')
  .filterBounds(region)
  .filterDate(start, end)
  .filter(ee.Filter.eq('instrumentMode', 'IW'))
  .filter(ee.Filter.listContains('transmitterReceiverPolarisation', 'VV'))

// Fastest: pick one image if available; fallback to mosaic or median if you prefer stability
var img = ee.Image(s1.sort('system:time_start').first())
var vv_lin = ee.Image(
  ee.Algorithms.If(
    img, img.select('VV'), s1.mosaic().select('VV')
  )
).clip(region)

var vv_db = vv_lin.log10().multiply(10)

Export.image.toDrive({
  image: vv_db.toFloat(),
  description: 'dubai_regions_s1_vv_db_week_example',
  folder: 'earthengine',
  fileNamePrefix: 'dubai_regions_s1_vv_db_week_example',
  fileFormat: 'GeoTIFF',
  region: region,
  scale: 10,
  crs: 'EPSG:3857',
  maxPixels: 1e13
})












##########################
FOLLOWING IS THE SAR before - after task
##########################

var fc = ee.FeatureCollection({
  "type":"FeatureCollection","features":[
    {"type":"Feature","geometry":{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[55.21003905177415,25.076774258770524],[55.19664946437181,25.060991951646685],[55.19501868129075,25.05275013595706],[55.19785109401049,25.045129851049683],[55.19965353846849,25.043496871235302],[55.209524067643294,25.045129851049687],[55.220424565079824,25.050184174546025],[55.22282782435716,25.05523828966504],[55.21982375026048,25.065890126643815],[55.21458807826341,25.07358686309247],[55.21003905177415,25.076774258770524]]]},"id":"0","properties":{"name":"jumeirah_village_circle"}},
    {"type":"Feature","geometry":{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[55.249635385146775,25.18003250445051],[55.2674881683499,25.16830306645511],[55.27641455995146,25.176847801781438],[55.28345267640654,25.180964596806056],[55.294009851089164,25.183605486431023],[55.293065713515915,25.191294809657663],[55.289289163222946,25.194867461359095],[55.2831951843411,25.191372477113294],[55.277873681655564,25.18469289493505],[55.26903312074248,25.1902851282279],[55.26765982972685,25.19432380373002],[55.26422660218779,25.196265426975778],[55.249635385146775,25.18003250445051]]]},"id":"1","properties":{"name":"business_bay"}},
    {"type":"Feature","geometry":{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[55.123528842419546,25.070940045705534],[55.13082445094006,25.065808830926738],[55.134515170544546,25.066858415072858],[55.15502870509045,25.08726520786672],[55.14884889552013,25.091851409287244],[55.1451152605714,25.08780934244539],[55.14292657801525,25.08699313967015],[55.1378196520509,25.091579351286892],[55.13447225520031,25.092084601377486],[55.13408601710216,25.090452247413005],[55.1346868319215,25.0890142032599],[55.136703853100705,25.089247400757078],[55.13734758326428,25.087848209108426],[55.13696134516612,25.086371267235386],[55.141810779065054,25.082834307672364],[55.13043821284191,25.071678611953597],[55.12824953028575,25.07198958588346],[55.12558877894298,25.07393315505499],[55.123528842419546,25.070940045705534]]]},"id":"2","properties":{"name":"dubai_marina"}},
    {"type":"Feature","geometry":{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[55.268107497277796,25.194440362929946],[55.26909455019528,25.19059586126263],[55.27776344973141,25.185197820807172],[55.2799950476318,25.187683279216653],[55.282655798974574,25.19113953553173],[55.286260687890596,25.193236542124282],[55.28892143923336,25.195100517674863],[55.27076824862057,25.204847091827386],[55.26445969301754,25.19645964852905],[55.268107497277796,25.194440362929946]]]},"id":"3","properties":{"name":"downtown_dubai"}}
  ]
});

function regionByName(name) {
  return fc.filter(ee.Filter.eq('name', name)).geometry();
}

function monthlyVVdB(region, monthStart) {
  var start = ee.Date(monthStart);
  var end = start.advance(1, 'month');
  var s1 = ee.ImageCollection('COPERNICUS/S1_GRD')
    .filterBounds(region)
    .filterDate(start, end)
    .filter(ee.Filter.eq('instrumentMode', 'IW'))
    .filter(ee.Filter.listContains('transmitterReceiverPolarisation', 'VV'))
    .select('VV');
  var vv_lin_mean = s1.mean();
  var vv_db = vv_lin_mean.log10().multiply(10).clip(region);
  return vv_db.toFloat();
}

var regions = [
  {key: 'downtown', name: 'downtown_dubai'},
  {key: 'marina', name: 'dubai_marina'},
  {key: 'jvc', name: 'jumeirah_village_circle'}
];

var months = [
  {label: '2016_05', start: '2016-05-01'},
  {label: '2025_05', start: '2025-05-01'}
];

regions.forEach(function(r) {
  var geom = regionByName(r.name);
  months.forEach(function(m) {
    var img = monthlyVVdB(geom, m.start);
    Export.image.toDrive({
      image: img,
      description: 's1_vv_db_mean_' + r.key + '_' + m.label,
      folder: 'earthengine',
      fileNamePrefix: 's1_vv_db_mean_' + r.key + '_' + m.label,
      fileFormat: 'GeoTIFF',
      region: geom,
      scale: 10,
      crs: 'EPSG:3857',
      maxPixels: 1e13
    });
  });
});
